title: Patch File
name: patch_file
description: Replace a specific string in a file with a new string. The old_string must exist exactly in the file. Use replace_all=true to replace all occurrences. Returns an error if old_string is not found.

file_path.description: The absolute path to the file to patch.

old_string.description: The exact string to find and replace. Must match exactly (including whitespace).

new_string.description: The string to replace old_string with.

replace_all.description: If true, replace all occurrences. Default: false (replace first occurrence only).

author: admin
